original_image_tags: Large handwritten initials "W H" or similar, signed over the note.

elements.description: A typed letter on aged paper with handwritten signatures, stamps, and annotations. The typed text includes a date 'May 25, 1949', an address to 'Mrs. Henry Beston, Chimney Farm, Nobleboro, Maine', a body text thanking for information, and a signature line 'John Edgar Hoover, Director'. Below the signature is a typed note about a 'small object in the sky' and 'weather balloon'. The page contains multiple handwritten signatures and stamps, including a red stamp '62-83894-179' and a blue stamp 'MAY 26 5 13 PM... FBI'. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Description B explicitly states 'No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present' while Description A identifies 'Large handwritten initials W H' as a visual element, creating a direct contradiction on the presence of any visual content.
